metadata.description: The subject is a female presenting individual in their 30s with olive skin and visible pores, particularly on the forehead and nose. Her face is oval with a softly defined jawline. Her dark brown hair is pulled back into a low ponytail, revealing a natural hairline and some wispy strands around her temples. She has striking blue-green eyes, almond-shaped and set slightly wide apart, with thin, arched eyebrows. Her nose is straight with a slightly rounded tip, and her lips are medium-thick with a subtle upward curve. Numerous small, light brown freckles are scattered across her nose and cheeks, and she has a small mole on her left cheekbone. Her features suggest a Mediterranean or Middle Eastern background. She has a gentle, closed-mouth smile, and her head is angled slightly to her right, looking directly at the viewer.
metadata.anchor: blue-green eyes and freckled olive skin
